title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Adobe India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Adobe India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Adobe India Holdings Services in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Adobe India Holdings Services:
Adobe India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India Holdings Services!
